checkin.journal:
Last day of my family being here - it feels like we did so many things and I already miss them but they are gone for 30 min - it was sooo fun
Woke up full of energy - didn’t sleep so much but I think I did like 7 hours
Celery juice
Golf training with Tim and whole family was nice we all did much better - Domen is doing really good
Then some pinball
Then ride to Dubai Mall - we ate in a great restaurant The Trove. Also very expensive but it was worth it.
Then shopping got 2 more Boss t-shirts
We
